children.heading: .—Establishment of Cost and Schedule Baselines
children.label: a .—Establishment of Cost and Schedule Baselines
A
children.text: The Administrator shall establish a cost and schedule baseline for each nuclear stockpile life extension or new nuclear weapon program project of the Administration prior to entry into Phase 6.4 or Phase 4, as appropriate. In addition to the requirement under subparagraph (B), the cost and schedule baseline of a nuclear stockpile life extension or new nuclear weapon program project established under this subparagraph shall be the cost and schedule as described in the first Selected Acquisition Report submitted under section 6125(a) for the project.

children.label: B
children.text: The cost baseline developed under subparagraph (A) shall include, with respect to each stockpile life extension or new nuclear weapon program project, an estimated cost for each warhead in the project.

children.label: C
children.text: Not later than 30 days after establishing a cost and schedule baseline under subparagraph (A), the Administrator shall submit the cost and schedule baseline to the congressional defense committees.

children.label: A
children.text: The Administrator shall establish a cost and schedule baseline for each major alteration project prior to entry into Phase 6.4.

children.label: B
children.text: The cost baseline developed under subparagraph (A) shall include, with respect to each major alteration project, an estimated cost for each warhead in the project.

children.label: C
children.text: Not later than 30 days after establishing a cost and schedule baseline under subparagraph (A), the Administrator shall submit the cost and schedule baseline to the congressional defense committees.

children.label: D
children.text: In this paragraph, the term "major alteration project" means a nuclear weapon system alteration project of the Administration the cost of which exceeds $800,000,000.

children.label: i
children.text: in excess of $65,000,000; and

children.label: ii
children.text: carried out by the Department using funds authorized to be appropriated for a fiscal year pursuant to a DOE national security authorization.

children.label: B
children.text: Not later than 30 days after establishing a cost and schedule baseline under subparagraph (A), the Secretary shall submit the cost and schedule baseline to the congressional defense committees.

children.label: i
children.text: in excess of $65,000,000; and

children.label: ii
children.text: carried out by the Department pursuant to such protocols.

children.label: B
children.text: Not later than 30 days after establishing a cost and schedule baseline under subparagraph (A), the Secretary shall submit the cost and schedule baseline to the congressional defense committees.

the total cost for a project referred to in paragraph (1), (2), (3), or (4) of subsection (a) will exceed an amount that is equal to 125 percent of the cost baseline established under subsection (a) for that project; and

in the case of a stockpile life extension or new nuclear weapon program project referred to in subsection (a)(1) or a major alteration project referred to in subsection (a)(2), the cost for any warhead in the project will exceed an amount that is equal to 150 percent of the cost baseline established under subsection (a)(1)(B) or (a)(2)(B), as applicable, for each warhead in that project.

children.heading: .—Notification of Determination With Respect to Termination or Continuation of Projects and Root Cause Analyses
children.label: c .—Notification of Determination With Respect to Termination or Continuation of Projects and Root Cause Analyses

children.text: notify the congressional defense committees with respect to whether the project will be terminated or continued;

children.label: A
children.text: a revised cost and schedule baseline has been established for the project and, in the case of a stockpile life extension or new nuclear weapon program project referred to in subparagraph (A) or (B) of subsection (a)(1) or a major alteration project referred to in subsection (a)(2), a revised estimate of the cost for each warhead in the project has been made;

children.label: B
children.text: a review of the revised baseline has been conducted by the Director of Cost Estimating and Program Evaluation of the National Nuclear Security Administration, consistent with section 3221(d)(1)(F) of the National Nuclear Security Administration Act ().50 U.S.C. 2411(d)(1)(F)

children.label: C
children.text: the continuation of the project is necessary to the mission of the Department of Energy and there is no alternative to the project that would meet the requirements of that mission; and

children.label: D
children.text: a management structure is in place adequate to manage and control the cost and schedule of the project; and

children.label: A
children.text: unrealistic performance expectations;

children.label: B
children.text: unrealistic baseline estimates for cost or schedule;

children.label: C
children.text: immature technologies or excessive manufacturing or integration risk;

children.label: D
children.text: unanticipated design, engineering, manufacturing, or technology integration issues arising during program performance;

children.label: E
children.text: changes in procurement quantities;

children.label: F
children.text: inadequate program funding or funding instability;

children.label: G
children.text: poor performance by personnel of the Federal Government or contractor personnel responsible for program management; or

children.label: H
children.text: any other matters.

children.heading: .—Applicability of Requirements to Revised Cost and Schedule Baselines
children.label: d .—Applicability of Requirements to Revised Cost and Schedule Baselines

children.text: be submitted to the congressional defense committees with the certification submitted under subsection (c)(2) and the results of the review conducted by the Director of Cost Estimating and Program Evaluation under subsection (c)(2)(B); and
be subject to the notification requirements of subsections (b) and (c) in the same manner and to the same extent as a cost and schedule baseline established under subsection (a).
